**Title:** `[PR] ` – Short description of the change

**Description**
A clear and concise description of what this pull request does.

- Fixes a bug
- Adds a new feature
- Improves documentation
- Refactors code

**Type of Change**

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactor
- [ ] Other (please describe)

**Related Issue(s)**
Link any relevant issue numbers, e.g.: `Closes #12`

**How Has This Been Tested?**
Explain how you tested your changes. Include code examples if relevant.
Example:

```vue
<template>
  <nepali-date-picker v-model="date" />
</template>

<script setup>
import { ref } from "vue";
import NepaliDatePicker from "nepali-date-picker-vue";

const date = ref("");
</script>
```

**Checklist**

- [ ] My code follows the package’s coding style
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] I have updated documentation if necessary
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or notes for maintainers here.
